name: phase3-on-save-vision-assessor
description: Review vision_assessor.py for safety and API correctness when saved

action.message:
vision_assessor.py was just saved. Review it for:
1. assess() wraps _call_nova() in try/except — returns VisionDecision.safe_continue() on ANY exception, never raises
2. Bedrock Converse API: image block uses raw bytes in source["bytes"] — NOT base64-encoded string
3. Image block comes BEFORE text block in content list
4. Response text extracted from response["output"]["message"]["content"][0]["text"]
5. _parse_decision() strips markdown fences before JSON parsing
6. Unknown action defaults to "continue" — never raises on unexpected action value
7. confidence clamped to [0.0, 1.0]
8. reasoning capped at 200 chars
9. boto3 config: connect_timeout=10, read_timeout=30, retries max_attempts=1
Report any violations.
